Copywriting blueprint – Week 5 Session 9
Or
Copywriting blueprint – Week 5 Session 1
Dovi – control diabetes
Stop watching your granddaughter cry because you can't eat the cookies she just made you
(negative twist)
Now you can eat all of the cookies you want that your granddaughter made you… (positive
twist)
Derek - Become a best selling author “Have movie producers battling each other for the rights to
turn your
Scott - Close so many sales in a week your banker will think there is a typo in your check and
will have to get it verified
3:20
These primary goals can be used one time or once roughly every 4 months – these are meant to
grab attention. There is a need to have multiple versions of these. These are versions or headlines
or signs offs in emails.
Hotseats:
5:15
Derek – Have Hollywood producers battling each other to turn your book into the next big
blockbuster
Become a household name like JK Rowling's
Anchoring with names –
Have Opera beg you to come onto her show - One name celebrities work well
Get flooded with requests from your ideal clients begging to pay you top dollar for your work.
Receive emails from readers saying “I love your book! You’re my new favorite author
Break the content into other pieces.
These pieces of content can become great bullets – reduce down from a headline to a bullet when
possible.
What needs to be work on – remove words that are unnecessary in the copy (for, how, your)
Simplify the wording structure – Fans praise you for how you changed their lives
Best copy trick is to read the copy out loud – look for places where there are stumbles, if its
wordy or doesn’t make sense make sure to edit the copy. Cut the sentences shorter and remove
unnecessary words.
Bullet trick – expand secondary goals as bullet.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 8 --

Benefits driven as bullets really help with the copy.
10:30
Status in the copy
Look for ways to validate status in the positive headline (go to the bank manager, grandma to get
cookies and Hollywood producers will give you attention) status is important.
A primary goal in negative terms with be a raise of life ability.
11:30
Daniella – Primary goal may be off – Lose arm fat
The real primary goal is to lose fat.
Arm fat solution – There is a book to be written about this (its not possible to just lose arm fat)
Lose arm fat – secondary goal
You want nothing more than to don a tank top this summer, but thick arms make you self
conscious when you go sleeveless.
Instead paint a positive picture for the reader.
Wear a tank top to wholefoods and have women at the store stop you and ask how you made
your arms so strong
You will look forward to clothes shopping – needs more
Instead try this:
You may need to worry about tapping out your credit cards when you go shopping for new
clothes. You may even need to empty out an extra closet for your new wardrobe. (expanded like
crazy from Jon)
You will look so good in your sexy black dress your husband will ask you to wear the dress
around your house.
16:00
The idea of the primary solution is important for the reader.
Primary solution - Todd Brown calls this the unique mechanism
False solutions – The most important part of this process
Ideas, tactics and strategies that the avatar has tried but has let them down. Beliefs are not items
they have tried. These are physical products or actions.
A mistaken belief is a mental barrier to get to where I want to go – A false solution is an action
they have taken.
These are essential to build good will – supply value – look for ways to save people time.
Look for ways to help the reader save time. This builds not just good will but rapport as well.
If you have been embarrassed by this
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 8 --

Empathy is important – Notice the words “Something you may have tried in the past” and “that
probably let you down”. (The idea is to look at may have let you down)
The solution let you down.
You were duped by something or someone (other people also).
False solutions come before primary solutions
18:30
Copypro notes
False solutions need to be defined before alternative solutions in copypro
In copypro look up the alternatives and come up with 3 false solutions that are slightly differnt –
this will help find the primary solution
Look for things you can rename or repackage
False solutions examples:
· 	Starving yourself on low calorie or low fat diets (I hate this one)
· 	Attending a wealth building work shop (MLM forever)
· 	Using clever pick up lines (Hey girl)
These are all common tactics the avatar has tried, the key is common tactics – this gives the
appearance you can read their mind – this builds hope.
Dieters have tried to starve themeszleves
Money seekers have been to a wealth building seminar
Dudes have met a PUA and used clever pick up lines.
Good will is achieved when the copy shows what to do instead … and that also paves the way
toward the primary solution.
Jon likes to say “helpful but incomplete” – get the gist of how the help comes from
21:00
Example of adding good will
“Starving yourself on low calorie or low fat diets”
Try cycling your carbs and calories. Essentially you eat a diet lower in carbs and calories for a
few days, then just at the right time, which is critical, you spike both calories and carbs. This
gives you the best of both worlds: the benefits of lower carbs without depriving yourself.
However, timing is critical.
Formula
Try __________ (prescriptive action). Essentially it is ___________ (explain how prescription
works) This gives you __________ (success explained) However __________ (explain a risk)
This information is helpful but incomplete
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 8 --

Things have been left out to get to the primary solution – this is the most important variable in
the copy. Curiosity is built.
22:00
A primary solution is the most important variable in the copy
Weight loss niche - has tons of primary solutions
Look to use something that is a “branded term” around the problem, pain or risk – this should
add uniqueness to the offer to create curiosity for the offer. Use something that is going to stand
out. This is headline type material. Upper case, lower case, type case etc…
A primary solution is never the offer – it is never a description of the offer – this needs to be a
branded term that powers the offer. This is the unique mechanism that powers the offer.
24:00
The solution is what experts now call __________ (primary solution) and only found within
__________ (product name)
Other people may have parts and pieces but my product or service has all of it
The components can be found in 100’s of different offers – this primary solution encompasses all
of these but I have named them so a customer says “That is why I have never succeeded before”
and or “this sounds interesting”
This is all about giving hope to the person reading.
Examples –
· 	Beechwood aged – Budweiser (wood container)
· 	Muscle confusion – P90x
· 	Steam clean technology – Grill Daddy
· 	Rotational refeeding – 4 day diet
· 	Dynamic blueprints – Copypro
Copy pro is dynamic blue prints, this is what some experts call __________ (and it is only
available in my product)
26:00
How to build a primary solution
Primary goal – I want to lose weight
Ask myself: what works to do that
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 8 --

Lowing calories, eating less food, exercising more – stuff they have tried – stuff that works –
stuff that is awful (nothing here sounds unique) Think of a infomercial that makes fun of tasks
people have tried to come up with some ideas and then edit.
Something has to be slightly different.
Make the fix simple
Look for just one unique approach you take in your program
I ask people to eat less calories (ketogenic state) / carbs for 3 days then more on the 4th
Rotational refeeding came from combining two terms – R-R alliterations – refeeding sounds
better than dieting.
Break it down into core components – what am I asking someone to do and what is another way
of saying it.
Use google to come up with idea.
29:00
Uses for primary solutions –
· 	..Something experts are calling the __________ (primary solution) (Same thing as
primary cause but positive)
· 	… could the real answer be __________ (primary solution)
· 	__________ (primary solution) the trick behind celebrity___________ (niche) success
· 	There is only one system on earth that was created around __________ (primary
solution) … ____________ (offer here)
31:30
Take the product and strip it down to its bare essence and come up with a 2-name product (3
max) Think in terms of something that can be trademarked – this isn’t the name of the book or
the product but the name of the mechanism.
This is easy to teach and not easy to do.
Jon is asking me to look for the unique thing that is being sold – people hammer on the product
or service but not what is unique about it.
Most marketers do not look for the unique angle that makes things stand out (this is the primary
solution)
Formula
The only product that has been built from the ground up to support __________ (primary
solution)
What is the only product that has __________ (primary solution)
LeAnn – Beachwood aged – everyone has it but not commonly advertised – look for something
nobody is talking about or pointed out.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 8 --

Claude Hopkins – Shlitz Beer – Steam purified (every beer was steam purified – Shlitz was the
first to start talking about this) – someone may not have noticed this yet.
35:00
Dovi – Save people time – Do aging people want to have their time wasted?
John Carlton says look for the magic pill people can take to fix their problem = __________
(primary concern)
Jon was critiquing some copy and a guy asked wouldn’t you want to be able to stop the hands of
time… no people want to turn it back
We both know how valuable time is and how little of it is left for both of us. I want to give you
as much information I can and honor your sacred time, the time we both have left to make a
difference in the world – You are about to die in a nice and respectful way.
38:30
Tim – How similar is the primary solution and USP? The 4 day diet is the foremost… (there is a
formula for a USP) There is nothing in USP where the reader can say I don’t know what that
means – clarity is power in the USP. Persuasion is clarity
“I have the only online software in the world that writes intelligent copy at a click of a button
that any marketer can use to promote their product in the click of a button” Jon freestyled this as
an example.
Curiosity can be built in the copy.
40:30
Patricia – Are there other brainstorming tactics besides cold showers?
A cold shower highlights the senses. A shower may work
Get on a treadmill – use motion
Idea hacks – get a group of people around and say what is something you think of when you
think of __________ (product, problem or issues)
Flabby arm solution – idea product for women
Know your avatar – women don’t care about or respond to love handles but they do respond to
muffin tops
If the book is called the “arm fat solution” can be a primary goal and a kick ass lead magnet.
A technique for producing ideas – James Web Young (book)
Absorbing data is one way to pull information from later.
46:30
Brennan – How does the primary solution work with not product solutions – suit – car – watch
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 8 --

“Our watches are created with what we call the “swiss armchair technology” this goes into every
watch we build. (this was made up on the fly)
There will be times where this isn’t used. Most things have primary solutions.
Use this as an exercise to get used to the process.
Bicycle repair shop -
We approach every single bike repair with the playing card technique (When we repair a bike we
go back to when we were 5 or 6. We remember how important bikes were to use the same
thoughts when we repair your kids’ bike)
Think though this as the concept of a primary solution
50:00
The flabby arm fix – book / lead magnet
Oscar – struggled with primary solution – Named a checklist
Take the words and Google them to find something people are not talking about or that is unique
Ask myself – what in my process that gets me the best response – what is the secret sauce? Other
people may do this my job is to give it a curious unique type of name.
The _________ method
“I go through a unique process of asking questions that force you to bring out answers your
would never think of before, I call this the _________ method”
Ryan Deiss and Perry Belcher at Digitalmarketer.com rebranded trip wire from a SLO (Self
liquidating offer)
Note: A good intake form forces people to think in terms of things they have never thought
about before. (My method could be built around this)
54:00
Tim – The best brainstorming can be done thought the ASK method.
The echo strategy - use peoples own words, where do I listen to my own words, where do words
reappear from… = the echo strategy. Echoing back what they have said
Take what was spoken and think through of how to say or imply the solution
Walk people through this process on an onboarding call.
A dry cleaner has a mundane process – when someone comes up with a phrase or idea of how to
explain the process it is now interesting.
Think through and idea and then let it sit for 24 hours
Ask people – “What is the first thing when you think of __________”
58:00
If there isnt time to do a DDS (ask survey) read 2 and 3 star reviews on amazon. Reviews and
forums are great places to look for the words of the avatar.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 8 --

Blind email
“there is a new way to lose weight that I just came across that forces your body to release fat
stores between 2 am and 5 am in the morning… It’s the craziest, weirdest, easiest thing I have
ever tried, I cant believe I haven’t tried it before… it was in my kitchen sink.. here is how you
do it“
Blind means there is no description and it is built around curiosity.
What is rotational feeding … here is what it is ___________ (some of the definition) of course
this isn’t the whole process… it is a brief overview but we will get to more of that in a moment.
There is more to it to that..
Homework
Primary solution is developed by defining it and creating an analogy for it.
Jon will look for people to use an analogy
The homework is to complete the solutions tab – “think of __________ (primary solution)
as_________ “
